name: @andrewpopov/url-guard
description: SSRF guard for server-side fetches of user-supplied URLs: blocks non-http(s)/credentialed/disallowed-port URLs, localhost + internal-suffix hosts, and IP literals or DNS resolutions in private/reserved ranges (IPv4 + rigorous IPv6).
author: Andrew Popov

scripts.verify: npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run build && npm run verify:pack
